title: Super Money Mod
description: Adds minecraft money in-game (only for Forge)
body:
Super Money Mod, the mod that adds currency in Minecraft!
This mod is still in development, so expect missing features that are yet to be added soon.
Additions:
Onecoin
Eightcoin
Stackcoin
Eightstackcoin
Onenote
Eightnote
Stacknote
Ultinote
Lapistone
Lapistone Block
Lapistone Note

Created in MCreator.
